= Liero Factory (Revisited) =
<div class="thumb tright"><div class="thumbinner" style="width:182px;">[[File:LFr.JPG|Liero Factory (Revisited) overview]] <div class="thumbcaption"><div class="magnify" style="float:right"><a href="/wiki/index.php/Image_LFr.JPG/"><img alt="" src="/wiki/skins/common/images/magnify-clip.png"/></a></div>Liero Factory (Revisited) overview</div></div></div>

The second incarnation of the popular Liero Factory made by MrEvil from [[42]] clan.

[[Category:Levels]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100203194154/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Liero_Factory_%28Revisited%29 -->
